ConstructorArguments: Called on the host to decide whether to accept a Connection.

Documentation.Summary: Called on the host to decide whether to accept a <see cref="T:Sandbox.Connection" />.

Params.reason: The reason to display to the client.

ConstructorArguments: Called when the network system should handle initialization.

Documentation.Summary: Called when the network system should handle initialization.

ConstructorArguments: A client has connected to the server but hasn't fully finished joining yet.

Documentation.Summary: A client has connected to the server but hasn't fully finished joining yet.

ConstructorArguments: Fully joined the server. Can be called when changing the map too. The game should usually create some object for the player to control here.

Documentation.Summary:
Fully joined the server. Can be called when changing the map too. The game should usually create
some object for the player to control here.

ConstructorArguments: A client has disconnected from the server.

Documentation.Summary: A client has disconnected from the server.

ConstructorArguments: The host left the server and you are now in charge.

Documentation.Summary: The host left the server and you are now in charge.

ConstructorArguments: The current host has been changed.

Documentation.Summary: The current host has been changed.

ConstructorArguments: Allows to push some kind of scope when reading network messages. This is useful if you need to adjust Time.Now etc.

Documentation.Summary:
Allows to push some kind of scope when reading network messages. This is useful if you
need to adjust Time.Now etc.
Called every frame

ConstructorArguments: True if we can be considered the host of this session. Either we're not connected to a server, or we are and we are the host.

Documentation.Summary: True if we can be considered the host of this session. Either we're not connected to a server, or we are and we are the host.

ConstructorArguments: True if we're connected to a server and not the host.

Documentation.Summary: True if we're connected to a server and not the host.

ConstructorArguments: True if we're currently connecting to the server

Documentation.Summary: True if we're currently connecting to the server

ConstructorArguments: True if we're currently connected etc

Documentation.Summary: True if we're currently connected etc

ConstructorArguments: An instance of this is created by the NetworkSystem when a server is joined, or created. You should not try to create this manually.
An instance of this is created by the NetworkSystem when a server is joined, or created. You should not try to create this manually.

Documentation.Summary:
An instance of this is created by the NetworkSystem when a server is joined, or created.
You should not try to create this manually.

ConstructorArguments: True if this lobby is full (Members >= MaxMembers).

Documentation.Summary: True if this lobby is full (Members >= MaxMembers).

ConstructorArguments: True if this lobby should be hidden from server lists.

Documentation.Summary: True if this lobby should be hidden from server lists.
Ping in milliseconds. Only available for dedicated servers, -1 if unknown.

ConstructorArguments: Whether to automatically destroy this lobby when the host leaves. This is only applicable to P2P lobbies.

Documentation.Summary:
Whether to automatically destroy this lobby when the host leaves. This is only
applicable to P2P lobbies.

ConstructorArguments: Whether to periodically switch to the best possible host candidate. This is only applicable to P2P lobbies.

Documentation.Summary:
Whether to periodically switch to the best possible host candidate. This is only
applicable to P2P lobbies.

ConstructorArguments: Whether to hide this lobby from appearing in the server list. It will still be queryable programatically, so long as the LobbyConfig.Privacy mode allows it.

Documentation.Summary:
Whether to hide this lobby from appearing in the server list. It will still be
queryable programatically, so long as the <see cref="P:Sandbox.Network.LobbyConfig.Privacy" /> mode allows it.

ConstructorArguments: Determines who is able to connect to this lobby. This will be public by default.

Documentation.Summary: Determines who is able to connect to this lobby. This will be public by default.

ConstructorArguments: The maximum amount of players this lobby can hold. By default, this will be the Max Players set in the current Game Package's project settings.

Documentation.Summary:
The maximum amount of players this lobby can hold. By default, this will be
the Max Players set in the current Game Package's project settings.

ConstructorArguments: The name of this lobby. If this isn't set, a default lobby name will be chosen instead.

Documentation.Summary: The name of this lobby. If this isn't set, a default lobby name will be chosen instead.
